metaData.Ingredients: Aqua, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Isopropyl Palmitate, Paraffinum Liquidum, Glycerin, Cetyl Alcohol, Dimethicone
metaData.Key Information:
• The first body whitening & firming lotion that instantly brightens your skin for a fairer & even skin tone
• Enriched with Vitamin C for fairer & even skin tone and Q10 to boost cell energy for firmer skin
metaData.Preparation:
1. Apply the lotion daily all over your body
2. Close the lid after usage
metaData.Storage Information:
1. Store away from reach of children and babies
2. Do not store in places with high or low temperature, or within the exposure of UV rays
3. Store in a cool, dry place

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua, C12 - 15 Alkyl Benzoate, Glycerin, Alcohol Denat., Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Octocrylene, Sodium Phenylbenzimidazole Sulfonate, Cetyl Alcohol, Dimethicone, Palmitic Acid, Stearic Acid, Cetyl Palmitate, Glyceryl Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Tapioca Starch, Sodium Carbomer, Methylparaben, Glyceryl Glucoside, Ethylparaben, Persea Gratissima Oil, Propylparaben, Trisodium EDTA, Vitis Vinifera Seed Oil, Tocopheryl Acetate, Myristic Acid, Arachidic Acid, Oleic Acid, Benzoic Acid, Parfum
metaData.Key Information:
• With broad spectrum SPF 15 (UVA and UVB filters), your skin will look healthier and smooth
• Skin compatibility dermatologically approved
• Ingredients carefully selected according to strict quality standards
• Free of colourants and animal-derived ingredients
• Formulated to protect and repair dry and damaged skin in 10 ways:
1. Re-balances skin's pH
2. Repairs cracked skin
3. Hydrates flaky skin
4. Softens rough skin
5. Evens out skin tone
6. Brightens dull skin
7. Protects against UV rays
8. Deeply replenishes skin suppleness
9. Instantly moistures
10. Long lastingly visibly moisturised skin
metaData.Preparation:
• To use:
For best results, apply body lotion frequently day and night
• Important:
1. Product contains UV filters to reduce risk from the sun damage
2. Read and follow the instructions strictly
3. If any problem occurs, stop using and consult a doctor
